leadText: Meteor Falls (Japanese: 流星の滝 Meteor Falls) is a location in Hoenn. It is a large cave west of Fallarbor Town with a waterfall inside. In Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire, Meteor Falls is one of the ancestral homes of the Draconid people.

sections.title: In the games
sections.text: Contents 1 In the games 1.1 Role 1.2 Delta Episode 1.3 Items 1.4 Pokémon 1.4.1 Generation III 1.4.1.1 1F 1R 1.4.1.2 1F 2R & B1F 1R 1.4.1.3 B1F 2R 1.4.1.4 Steven's cave 1.4.2 Generation VI 1.4.2.1 1F 1R 1.4.2.2 1F 2R & B1F 1R 1.4.2.3 B1F 2R 1.5 Trainers 1.5.1 Pokémon Ruby and Sapphire 1.5.2 Pokémon Emerald 1.5.3 Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire 1.5.3.1 First visit 1.5.3.1.1 Pokémon Omega Ruby 1.5.3.1.2 Pokémon Alpha Sapphire 1.5.3.2 Beyond the waterfall 1.6 Layout 1.6.1 Interior 1.6.2 Exterior entrances 1.7 Music In the games [ edit | edit source ] Role [ edit | edit source ] Team Magma R E OR or Team Aqua S AS steal a Meteorite from Professor Cozmo at Meteor Falls. In Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire , Brendan / May accompanies the player to rescue the professor, and helps in a Multi Battle against Tabitha OR / Shelly AS and a Team Magma Grunt OR / Team Aqua Grunt AS . Afterwards, the villainous team heads to Mt. Chimney , while Professor Cozmo returns to Fallarbor Town. In Pokémon Emerald , Steven Stone appears here deep inside a new area after the player enters the Hall of Fame ; his Pokémon are considerably stronger than Champion Wallace 's. Delta Episode [ edit | edit source ] During the Delta Episode , after Professor Cozmo requests that the player retrieve a Meteorite Shard from Meteor Falls, the player and Steven encounter Zinnia 's grandmother at the top of the hills at the back of 1F 2R. At this point, Steven has already found a Meteorite Shard. Zinnia's grandmother tells the two about the history of the Draconid people in the Hoenn region, and Zinnia's desire to summon Rayquaza . After completing the Delta Episode, Zinnia's grandmother can be found in the middle of the first floor. When talked to, she will thank the player and give them Zinnia's Salamencite on her granddaughter's behalf. Afterwards, she can teach Dragon Ascent to Rayquaza . Status Beyond the waterfall [ edit | edit source ] Reaching any of these Trainers requires the use of both Surf and Waterfall to climb the waterfall in the main room. sections.title: Role
sections.text: Role [ edit | edit source ] Team Magma R E OR or Team Aqua S AS steal a Meteorite from Professor Cozmo at Meteor Falls. In Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire , Brendan / May accompanies the player to rescue the professor, and helps in a Multi Battle against Tabitha OR / Shelly AS and a Team Magma Grunt OR / Team Aqua Grunt AS . Afterwards, the villainous team heads to Mt. Chimney , while Professor Cozmo returns to Fallarbor Town. In Pokémon Emerald , Steven Stone appears here deep inside a new area after the player enters the Hall of Fame ; his Pokémon are considerably stronger than Champion Wallace 's.
